scope_note: QA E8 Satellite Chamber cert [496]. Primary sources: Wildberger, N.J. (2005) Divine Proportions Wild Egg Books ISBN 978-0-9757492-0-8 (QA T-operator, BEDA tuples, orbit classification, rational trigonometry quadrance G=d^2+e^2); Bourbaki (1968) Groupes et algebres de Lie Ch. 4-6 (E8 root system, Weyl chambers, Dynkin diagram); Humphreys, J.E. (1972) Introduction to Lie Algebras and Representation Theory Springer ISBN 978-0-387-90053-7 (E8 simple roots, Cartan matrix). CLAIM (narrowed 2026-07-04, falsifiable): For QA mod m=9 Satellite orbit (8 states, period 8), canonically anchored at (6,3) (independently verified as the unique orbit member whose reduced triple is the fundamental (3,4,5), not merely one of several satisfying C<F alone), the height function h = alpha*d^2 + beta*e^2 lies in the SAME E8 Weyl chamber as h=G if and only if 7/12 < alpha/beta < 13/12. The isotropic condition alpha=beta selects the unique ray h = c*(d^2+e^2), normalized to h = G = d^2+e^2. (2) G and G^2 have identical Satellite-axis ordering but lie in different E8 Weyl chambers (6 explicit Type 2 wall roots differ in sign); (3) parity reduction b+e+d+a+C+F+G ≡ b (mod 2) holds for all 576 QA pairs; (4) C^2+F^2=G^2 for all (b,e) (QA Pythagorean triple). RETRACTED 2026-07-04: the prior claim that '(6,3) is the branch node and (3,6) [Grant LRT] is the long-arm terminal leaf', and the associated 'G is unique among {b,e,d,a,C,F,G} for correct branch' claim, are withdrawn -- both relied on conflating an index into a filtered list of simple roots with a Satellite-axis index. Verified directly that the actual branch (degree-3) root for h=G touches axes 2 and 4, not axis 0; and since 7 of the 8 simple roots in this chamber are Type-2 (touching all 8 axes at once), no per-axis branch/distance claim has a well-defined meaning here. See qa_e8_satellite_chamber_cert_validate.py module docstring RETRACTION NOTE for full detail. Theorem NT: orbit steps and root computations are integer arithmetic; float projections are observer outputs only. Lineage: derived 2026-06-21 through iterative algebraic session; downgraded 2026-07-04 after independent re-verification.
